song.title: Ancient Words
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Holy words long preserved For our walk in this world; They resound with God’s own heart, O, let the ancient words impart;|| Words of life words of hope, Give us strength, help us cope; In this world where’er we roam, Ancient words will guide us home.
[C] Chorus Ancient words, ever true, Changing me, and changing you; We have come with open hearts, O let the ancient words impart.
[V2] 2) Holy words of our faith Handed down to this age, Came to us through sacrifice; O, heed the faithful words of Christ;|| Holy words long preserved For our walk in this world; They resound with God’s own heart; O, let the ancient words impart.
song.author: Lynn DeShazo
